title: Enhance website content with industry-standard references from AKS Engineering

requirements.text: Research and analyze AKS Engineering's website content structure, focusing on how they present their infrastructure development services, project portfolios, and company capabilities in the civil engineering sector

quotes: imprrove by some tentent taken as reference from AKS engineering work in the same field

acceptanceCriteria: Identify key content patterns from AKS Engineering that are relevant to infrastructure development companies
Document specific improvements that align with industry standards in civil engineering presentation

requirements.text: Enhance the About Us section with more detailed company credentials including years of experience, completed project count, team size, certifications, and industry affiliations similar to how established engineering firms present their credentials

quotes: imprrove by some tentent taken as reference from AKS engineering work in the same field

acceptanceCriteria: About section includes quantifiable metrics (years in operation, projects completed, etc.)
Professional certifications and industry memberships are displayed
Content follows industry-standard formatting for engineering firms

requirements.text: Expand the Services section with more detailed descriptions of each service category, including specific methodologies, equipment capabilities, and technical specifications that demonstrate engineering expertise

quotes: imprrove by some tentent taken as reference from AKS engineering work in the same field

acceptanceCriteria: Each service card includes technical details and methodologies
Service descriptions demonstrate depth of engineering capabilities
Content reflects industry-standard terminology and practices

requirements.text: Add a Projects Portfolio section showcasing completed infrastructure projects with project names, locations, contract values, completion dates, and brief descriptions, organized in a grid or carousel layout

quotes: imprrove by some tentent taken as reference from AKS engineering work in the same field

acceptanceCriteria: New Projects section is added between Services and Government sections
Projects are displayed in a responsive grid layout
Each project card shows key details: name, location, value, and completion date
Section maintains consistent styling with other page sections

requirements.text: Enhance the Government & Public Sector section with specific examples of successfully completed government projects, including client names, project scopes, and outcomes

quotes: imprrove by some tentent taken as reference from AKS engineering work in the same field

acceptanceCriteria: Government section includes concrete project examples
Client names and project outcomes are listed
Content demonstrates proven track record with government entities

requirements.text: Add industry certifications and quality standards section displaying ISO certifications, safety accreditations, and compliance badges with logos and certification numbers

quotes: imprrove by some tentent taken as reference from AKS engineering work in the same field

acceptanceCriteria: Certification badges are displayed in the Quality section
Each certification includes logo and registration number
Layout is responsive and visually organized

requirements.text: Improve the hero section headline and tagline to be more impactful and industry-specific, emphasizing infrastructure excellence and engineering innovation using language patterns common in leading engineering firms

quotes: imprrove by some tentent taken as reference from AKS engineering work in the same field

acceptanceCriteria: Hero headline is more compelling and industry-aligned
Tagline emphasizes unique value proposition
Language reflects professional engineering firm standards

constraints: Do not change the backend schema or main actor structure
Maintain existing color scheme (blue-900 primary, orange-500 CTAs)
Preserve all existing functionality including career form submission
Keep all immutable frontend paths unchanged (hooks, main.tsx, ui components)
nonGoals: Implementing actual project database or CMS
Adding authentication beyond existing Internet Identity integration
Creating admin panel for content management
Integrating with external APIs or third-party services

required: Professional infrastructure project photo showing construction site or completed building (project-1.dim_800x600.png)
Civil engineering project image showing road or bridge construction (project-2.dim_800x600.png)
Water infrastructure project photo showing pipeline or treatment facility (project-3.dim_800x600.png)
ISO certification badge logo with clean design (iso-cert.dim_200x200.png)
Quality standards emblem or safety certification badge (safety-badge.dim_200x200.png)
